name: economic-x-ray-vision
description: Local-first constraint intelligence prototype for healthcare administration friction.

scripts.dataset: npm run build:data && node scripts/build-dataset.ts && node scripts/audit-dataset.ts && node scripts/export-dataset.ts
scripts.evidence: npm run dataset && node scripts/build-evidence-dossiers.ts && node scripts/audit-evidence.ts
scripts.intervention: npm run evidence && node scripts/build-interventions.ts && node scripts/audit-interventions.ts
scripts.check: npm run validate && npm run build:data && npm run dataset && npm run evidence && npm run intervention && npm run lint && npm run build
